textByHash.4172ced00433009369ce2852ba7dee70aab22d46: I'm in charge of all the metalworking of Dorgesh-Kaan. It's a big responsibility!
textByHash.49e27c1d7f03a009509cf119f4f23b25ad3a8f3a: I'm worried the furnace will break you!
textByHash.60c41c05bdf873cef49e9977b57bcaa614232db0: We'd all be killed in our sleep! And it would be my fault!
textByHash.744d98269b799b0daf8db4c978624b0b9c2869b9: Those are highly technical tools. They're not like the tools you use on the surface.
textByHash.751344b5d3aedc0d830066b0a648fd301270114e: It's set up to make glass and jewellery at the moment. It's not safe to use it to smelt ore. What if you accidentally burn yourself?
textByHash.86e0f476b17b7159819b9efc0ef771a5c5250334: If something metal breaks I have to fix it. And lots of things are made of metal!
textByHash.ad2b06f9030ed6d0e11e8a4dc3d805ab6da9af72: What if you hurt yourself with them? I could be held responsible!
textByHash.b5a237a5c814c9e925862f93dc3e68d675fcb2f0: No, no, no, no, no - I can't take the risk.
textByHash.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHash.c2af49a970207febaef3f72f83db961455f884d4: I'm sorry. I'm just a bit jumpy.
textByHash.e2218a011b3bb652777666db9841512638f8c933: No, I think it's best if I don't let anyone use the tools.
textByHash.e5d3a4941d4aa350631161b7211c6577293c2300: What if you accidentally burn yourself and the surface people see that you're burnt and use that as a pretext to attack us?
